old_claim.note: Heavy Plow (Mouldboard Plow) provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency is retained between Crop Rotation (Three-Field System) and Heavy Plow (Mouldboard Plow); Three-field rotation is a land-use and cropping system; heavy plows can improve cultivation but are not a direct prerequisite for rotating winter crop, spring crop, and fallow fields.

source_shape.source_locator: Article defines the three-field system as a Middle Ages European agricultural organization that rotated winter crops, spring crops, and fallow land.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Three-field rotation is a land-use and cropping system; heavy plows can improve cultivation but are not a direct prerequisite for rotating winter crop, spring crop, and fallow fields.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The source supports the scoped Crop Rotation (Three-Field System) chronology or adjacent technology without requiring Heavy Plow (Mouldboard Plow) as a prerequisite.

ontology_before: Crop Rotation (Three-Field System) treated Heavy Plow (Mouldboard Plow) as a direct prerequisite.
ontology_after: Crop Rotation (Three-Field System) no longer directly depends on Heavy Plow (Mouldboard Plow); the dependency boundary is narrowed to operationally necessary predecessors.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Invariant changed: crop_rotation_three_field must not directly depend on heavy_plow_mouldboard unless a narrower source-backed node scope is introduced.
would_reject_if: A source shows crop_rotation_three_field is intentionally scoped only to cases that require heavy_plow_mouldboard.
The graph splits crop_rotation_three_field and reserves this id for a narrower technology directly dependent on heavy_plow_mouldboard.
A stronger source demonstrates that heavy_plow_mouldboard is chronologically and causally necessary for crop_rotation_three_field.
short_reason: Three-field rotation is a land-use and cropping system; heavy plows can improve cultivation but are not a direct prerequisite for rotating winter crop, spring crop, and fallow fields.
